steps.expected: Test file exists with comprehensive Chan Theory tests
steps.observed: Found tests/test_chan_theory.py with 48 test cases across 11 test classes

steps.expected: All tests pass covering fractal detection, MACD divergence, buy/sell signals
Top/bottom fractal detection works on known patterns
steps.observed: All 9 fractal detection tests passed: simple top fractal, simple bottom fractal, multiple fractals zigzag, no fractals in flat data, monotonic up/down, too few bars, bar with both top and bottom, correct date

steps.expected: Pen construction from fractals works correctly
steps.observed: All 7 pen construction tests passed: simple pen, rejection if too close, same-type keeps more extreme, multiple pens zigzag, direction down, empty/single fractal edge cases

steps.expected: Hub identification from overlapping pens works
steps.observed: All 3 hub identification tests passed: three overlapping pens form hub, non-overlapping no hub, fewer than min pens no hub

steps.action: Verify MACD divergence detection tests (TestMACDDivergence: 3 tests)
steps.expected: MACD divergence detection identifies top and bottom divergences
steps.observed: All 3 MACD divergence tests passed: top divergence detected, bottom divergence detected, no divergence when MACD grows

steps.action: Verify MACD area computation tests (TestMACDArea: 4 tests)
steps.expected: MACD area computation helper works correctly
steps.observed: All 4 area tests passed: positive area, negative area uses absolute, mixed area, invalid range returns zero

steps.action: Verify buy signal generation tests (TestBuySignalGeneration: 2 tests)
steps.expected: Buy signals generated on bottom-divergence patterns
steps.observed: All 2 buy signal tests passed: buy_1 bottom divergence at downtrend hub, known bottom divergence produces buy signal

steps.action: Verify sell signal generation tests (TestSellSignalGeneration: 1 test)
steps.expected: Sell signals generated on top-divergence patterns
steps.observed: Sell signal test passed: known top divergence produces sell signal

steps.action: Verify no-signal / hub oscillation tests (TestNoSignalCase: 4 tests)
steps.expected: No signals on flat/sideways data, empty/short data
steps.observed: All 4 no-signal tests passed: flat data no signals, sideways hub oscillation, empty dataframe, too few bars

steps.action: Verify integration with real market data (TestWithRealData: 1 test)
steps.expected: Strategy runs on real stock 000001 data from market.db
steps.observed: Real data test passed: strategy generates valid Signal objects from live market data

summary: Tested 1 assertion: 1 passed. VAL-STRAT-003 confirmed — all 48 Chan Theory pytest tests pass, covering fractal detection (9 tests), pen construction (7 tests), hub identification (3 tests), MACD divergence detection (3 tests), MACD area computation (4 tests), buy signal generation (2 tests), sell signal generation (1 test), no-signal scenarios (4 tests), strategy loading (8 tests), signal objects (2 tests), signal format (4 tests), and real market data integration (1 test).
